mapper.sql: select t.id, t.project_id, t.user_id, t.task_name, t.assign_date, t.required_finish_date, t.actual_finish_date, t.duration_require, t.total_duration, t.status, t.extra_data::text as extra_data, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from proj_task t
mapper.select: select t.id, t.project_id, t.user_id, t.task_name, t.assign_date, t.required_finish_date, t.actual_finish_date, t.duration_require, t.total_duration, t.status, t.extra_data::text as extra_data, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark, p.project_name, u.user_name from proj_task t left join proj_project p on p.id = t.project_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.user_id where t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into proj_task( project_id, user_id, task_name, assign_date, required_finish_date, actual_finish_date, duration_require, total_duration, status, extra_data, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{taskName}, #{assignDate}, #{requiredFinishDate}, #{actualFinishDate}, #{durationRequire}, #{totalDuration}, #{status}, #{extraData}::jsonb, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.delete: update proj_task set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update proj_task set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
